## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, publishing processes, and performance metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/hFHtDTYhGyt8hBvA1MZwMmE9fYfm_-ky?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New publishing strategy without date limits to be implemented in \~2 weeks after website development backlog is cleared](https://fathom.video/share/hFHtDTYhGyt8hBvA1MZwMmE9fYfm_-ky?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Content improvement initiatives underway to enhance quality and reduce repetitive patterns](https://fathom.video/share/hFHtDTYhGyt8hBvA1MZwMmE9fYfm_-ky?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
  - [Strapi team to gain more autonomy with AirOps workflows for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/hFHtDTYhGyt8hBvA1MZwMmE9fYfm_-ky?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [Exploring integration of Clay for Contacts tool to analyze ICP fit of blog traffic](https://fathom.video/share/hFHtDTYhGyt8hBvA1MZwMmE9fYfm_-ky?tab=summary&timestamp=2135.0)

## Topics

### Content Publishing and Updates

  - [13 articles currently in drafts, with new batch ready for this week](https://fathom.video/share/hFHtDTYhGyt8hBvA1MZwMmE9fYfm_-ky?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Revalidation process needed after updating articles in CMS to reflect changes on frontend](https://fathom.video/share/hFHtDTYhGyt8hBvA1MZwMmE9fYfm_-ky?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Discussing best practices for publishing dates to avoid SEO penalties](https://fathom.video/share/hFHtDTYhGyt8hBvA1MZwMmE9fYfm_-ky?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Exploring addition of "original published" and "last updated" dates on articles](https://fathom.video/share/hFHtDTYhGyt8hBvA1MZwMmE9fYfm_-ky?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)

### Content Strategy and Quality

  - [Focusing on less technical, top-of-funnel content for refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/hFHtDTYhGyt8hBvA1MZwMmE9fYfm_-ky?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Implementing strategy to update intros/outros without touching technical core of articles](https://fathom.video/share/hFHtDTYhGyt8hBvA1MZwMmE9fYfm_-ky?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Addressing concerns about repetitive patterns in article structures](https://fathom.video/share/hFHtDTYhGyt8hBvA1MZwMmE9fYfm_-ky?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Enhancing knowledge base with specific sources (e.g., YouTube transcripts, blog posts) for more targeted content creation](https://fathom.video/share/hFHtDTYhGyt8hBvA1MZwMmE9fYfm_-ky?tab=summary&timestamp=1198.0)

### SEO and Performance Metrics

  - [Metrics for published articles now available in Airtable for easy access](https://fathom.video/share/hFHtDTYhGyt8hBvA1MZwMmE9fYfm_-ky?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Discussing implementation of RB2B JavaScript for better visitor identification and ICP scoring](https://fathom.video/share/hFHtDTYhGyt8hBvA1MZwMmE9fYfm_-ky?tab=summary&timestamp=2150.0)
  - [Planning to run content cannibalization reports on high-converting keywords](https://fathom.video/share/hFHtDTYhGyt8hBvA1MZwMmE9fYfm_-ky?tab=summary&timestamp=2023.0)

### Workflow Improvements

  - [Working on transferring some workflows from GrowthX to Strapi's AirOps account for increased autonomy](https://fathom.video/share/hFHtDTYhGyt8hBvA1MZwMmE9fYfm_-ky?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [Exploring creation of Strapi-specific AirOps app for easier data addition to the store](https://fathom.video/share/hFHtDTYhGyt8hBvA1MZwMmE9fYfm_-ky?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)

### Traffic Analysis and Lead Generation

  - [Introduced Clay for Contacts tool to analyze quality of ICPs visiting blog articles](https://fathom.video/share/hFHtDTYhGyt8hBvA1MZwMmE9fYfm_-ky?tab=summary&timestamp=2135.0)
  - [Discussed potential for advanced sequencing and targeted outreach based on visitor data](https://fathom.video/share/hFHtDTYhGyt8hBvA1MZwMmE9fYfm_-ky?tab=summary&timestamp=2207.0)
  - [Considering integration with existing RevOps tools (Common Room or Rio) for account scoring and enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/hFHtDTYhGyt8hBvA1MZwMmE9fYfm_-ky?tab=summary&timestamp=2266.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement revalidation for updated articles on Strapi website](https://fathom.video/share/hFHtDTYhGyt8hBvA1MZwMmE9fYfm_-ky?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Explore adding original published and last updated dates to articles](https://fathom.video/share/hFHtDTYhGyt8hBvA1MZwMmE9fYfm_-ky?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Share AirOps credentials and export workflow configurations for Strapi team](https://fathom.video/share/hFHtDTYhGyt8hBvA1MZwMmE9fYfm_-ky?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
  - [Schedule separate deep-dive session on CRO and RevOps integration with relevant team members](https://fathom.video/share/hFHtDTYhGyt8hBvA1MZwMmE9fYfm_-ky?tab=summary&timestamp=2436.0)
  - [Continue improving content quality and reducing repetitive patterns in articles](https://fathom.video/share/hFHtDTYhGyt8hBvA1MZwMmE9fYfm_-ky?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Prepare next batch of topic ideas for Strapi team's review early next week](https://fathom.video/share/hFHtDTYhGyt8hBvA1MZwMmE9fYfm_-ky?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
